query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.neighborhood, c.name as category 
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE c.id IN (7, 5, 12, 6, 13, 3) 
ORDER BY c.id, e.name 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.id, e.name, e.neighborhood, c.name as category 
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE c.id IN (7, 5, 12, 6, 13, 3) 
ORDER BY c.id, e.name 
LIMIT 20;
